/usr/bin/cc -O3 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-format-truncation -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-pointer-sign -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-address -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/bothtools.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/build.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/cmd.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/cmodel.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/common.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/crc.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/cvar.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/fs.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/hash.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/mathlib.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/pr2_cmds.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/pr2_edict.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/pr2_exec.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/vm.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/vm_interpreted.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/vm_x86.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/pr_cmds.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/pr_edict.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/pr_exec.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sha1.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sha3.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_broadcast.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_ccmds.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_demo.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_demo_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_demo_qtv.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_ents.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_init.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_login.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_main.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_master.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_mod_frags.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_move.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_nchan.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_phys.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_save.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_send.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_user.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/vfs_os.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/vfs_pak.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_world.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/zone.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/sv_sys_unix.c.o CMakeFiles/mvdsv.dir/src/central.c.o -o mvdsv  -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcre.so -lpthread
